name: Pinamon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Shocks whoever touches the Fuwa Feathers on its tails.

description: A Chick Digimon that always runs about restlessly. Because it expresses its emotions in how it runs, it doesn't stand still unless it is a time when it is bored or sleeping. Because its emotions do not appear on its face, its emotions must be read from how it runs, so it is a Digimon with which making a connection is very difficult. Although Pinamon hates its tails being touched, just like Puwamon , because a miniature electric shock, " Piripiri Spark ", is generated from the tails, more caution is needed when touching its tails than with Puwamon.
